operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toStartOfQuarter(event_date) AS quarter_start FROM test_dates WHERE event_date NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-01-01') AND toDateTime('2023-03-31');
SELECT id, value FROM test_dates WHERE NOT (toStartOfQuarter(event_date) > toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime('2023-12-31')) AND event_date < toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime('2024-01-01')));

WITH (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL) AS avg_value SELECT id, toStartOfQuarter(event_date) AS quarter_start, value FROM test_dates WHERE value NOT BETWEEN avg_value - 5 AND avg_value + 5;
SELECT DISTINCT id, toStartOfQuarter(event_date) AS quarter_start FROM test_dates WHERE event_date NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-07-01') AND toDateTime('2023-09-30') AND value IS NOT NULL;

CREATE TABLE temp_summary AS SELECT toStartOfQuarter(event_date) AS quarter, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates GROUP BY quarter HAVING quarter NOT BETWEEN toDate('2023-01-01') AND toDate('2023-12-31');

SELECT id, event_date, value FROM test_dates WHERE (toStartOfQuarter(event_date) NOT BETWEEN toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime('2023-01-01')) AND now()) AND (event_date IS NOT NULL OR value NOT BETWEEN -10 AND 10);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (start_date DateTime64(3), end_date DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY start_date;
SELECT start_date, end_date FROM edge_cases WHERE start_date NOT BETWEEN toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime64('2023-10-01 10:10:10.000', 3)) AND toStartOfQuarter(toDateTime64('2023-12-31 23:59:59.999', 3));
